notes: Additive CSS primitives under _ONBOARDING_CSS. No _BASE_CSS_VERSION bump. Progress stepper is role=progressbar with aria-label. Passphrase uses type=password + autocomplete=new-password. EURUSD checkbox pre-checked. Reset-install button styled red (destructive).
review_criteria: Frontend wires the five-step DOM + JS state machine
Every step transition scrolls the viewport to top
loadState() on wizard load resumes at the persisted step
Passphrase field: type=password + autocomplete=new-password + no default value
